# Browsers and devices

## Supported browsers

OUDS Web supports the **latest stable releases** of all major browsers.

### Mobile

|             | Chrome    | Firefox   | Safari    | Android Browser |
| ----------- | --------- | --------- | --------- | --------------- |
| **Android** | Supported | Supported | -         | v23.0+          |
| **iOS**     | Supported | Supported | Supported | -               |

### Desktop

|             | Chrome    | Firefox   | Edge      | Opera     | Safari    |
| ----------- | --------- | --------- | --------- | --------- | --------- |
| **Mac**     | Supported | Supported | Supported | Supported | Supported |
| **Windows** | Supported | Supported | Supported | Supported | -         |

Firefox ESR (Extended Support Release) is also supported.

## Not supported

- Internet Explorer
- Proxy browsers (Opera Mini, UC Browser Mini, Amazon Silk)

## Browser zooming

Page zooming may cause rendering artifacts. These are generally expected behavior.
